rationale: Create first purchase request for the initial executable work package (initial analytics setup) with an amount below the 1,000,000 threshold to require manager level approval, which has a shorter lead time to meet the delivery deadline.

Create second purchase request for the follow-up executable work package (follow-up optimization and reporting) with an amount below the 1,000,000 threshold to also require manager level approval, enabling parallel approval processes and reducing overall lead time.
